Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Changelog:
- Added options to edit profile to select picture border and card effect.
- Added preview within edit profile to visually see your profile card before saving.
- Changed cards on profiles tab to reflect chosen border/card effect for each profile.
- Added new beta tester border/card effect.
